title: rubus fruticosus var. sublustris
intro: Rubus fruticosus var. sublustris, also known as the Black Raspberry, is a thorny shrub native to Eastern North America, characterized by its dark red to black fruits and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Rubus fruticosus var. sublustris include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, boost the immune system, and help to prevent certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rubus fruticosus var. sublustris include teas, tinctures, and jams made from its fruits, leaves, and roots, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
